description_long: This object is a military-themed, vintage-style unicycle with a robust metal frame and a large, rounded front shield painted in olive drab and marked with a white star and 'U.S. ARMY' insignia. The unicycle features a single, thick treaded wheel, heavy-duty suspension, and a brown leather saddle seat. On one side, a red cross is painted, suggesting a medical or field support role, while the opposite side displays a serial number. The handlebars are wide and slightly angled, with a headlamp mounted at the front and a cylindrical canister attached to the top of the shield. The overall appearance is rugged, weathered, and utilitarian, with visible bolts, springs, and exhaust piping, evoking a World War II-era military vehicle.
description: A rugged, military-style unicycle with a large front shield, brown leather saddle, and heavy-duty frame, marked with U.S. Army insignia and a red cross.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large rounded shield, headlamp, and wide handlebars, with the treaded wheel and front suspension visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the white star, 'U.S. ARMY' text, red cross, and the cylindrical canister on top of the shield.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the brown leather saddle, rear frame, and license plate, with handlebars and canister visible from above.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the serial number, exhaust piping, and the mechanical details of the frame and engine.
attribute_frame_design: reinforced, vintage military, curved with shield
